query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bbox

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (prefilter by kommunenummer)

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons clipped to municipality extent

4.description: find buildings that intersect storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings intersecting storm-flood polygons

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy, ST_AsEWKB(omrade) AS omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsEWKB(representasjonspunkt) AS geom FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_AsEWKB(omrade) AS geom FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "geom"
